_doc: Rectangles (CSS px, top-left origin, full-page coords) painted out on BOTH sides before diffing, so known-intentional deltas and dynamic content never count. 'viewports' limits a rect to named breakpoints. NOTE: masking only meaningfully helps where the two captures are still vertically aligned (top of page). Below the first structural-length divergence (see route-parity / NEXT_STEPS), cumulative offset dominates the pixel diff and masks cannot recover it — that requires per-template structural parity, tracked as a follow-on.

global.note: Scorpion chat dock (Connect/Text/Call/Email) — removed by design; lived bottom-right of the original only

/.note: Hero background video frame — autoplay frame differs between captures (desktop hero band below the header)
Quiz card sidebar — our addition (keep); sits beneath the attorney video. Approximate band; intentional extra element.

/blogs/.note: Blog post dates / recency drift — original publishes new posts; card date rows differ

/reviews/.note: Review cards are dynamic content (count/order/recency differ from the original feed)
